name: micro-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for MICRO (IEEE/ACM International Symposium on Microarchitecture) submissions: venue fit, HotCRP submission audits, rebuttal/revision strategy, camera-ready, artifact evaluation and ACM badges, simulator-grade reproducibility, the no-appendix page discipline, review process, writing style, related work, experiments, and the four-venue architecture calendar. Grounded in the MICRO 2026 (59th, Athens) CFP and submission guidelines checked on 2026-07-08.
